checks.description: Result and flag signals must reflect the defined operation semantics for each supported opcode.
checks.pass_condition: For a given aluc value matching a defined opcode, r equals the expected arithmetic/logic result; zero is 1 iff r==0; negative is 1 iff r[31]==1; carry is 1 for unsigned overflow in ADDU/SUBU; overflow is 1 for signed overflow in ADD/SUB; flag is 1 only for SLT or SLTU (otherwise high-impedance). For undefined aluc, r is high-impedance.
checks.trigger_condition: When aluc matches any defined opcode.
